name: modify_debug_ports
short_description: Modify routed probe connections to debug cores.
full_help:
modify_debug_ports

Description: 
Modify routed probe connections to debug cores.

Syntax: 
modify_debug_ports  [-probes <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-probes]   List of probes to be connected: debug core pin, channel index, 
              and logical net for each probe connection.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Debug

arguments.description: List of probes to be connected: debug core pin, channel index, and logical net for each probe connection.
Suspend message limits during command execution
